chunks.title: Oracle Against Ammon
chunks.reason: A complete prophetic oracle directed at the sons of Ammon with a specific reason and judgment.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Moab
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic oracle targeting Moab and Seir with specific cities mentioned.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Edom
chunks.reason: A complete prophetic unit concerning Edom's vengeance against Judah.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Philistia
chunks.reason: The final distinct prophetic unit in this section targeting the Philistines.
